ai_summary: Havells India Limited has announced the appointment of Mr. Ashish Parikh as President & SBU Head, effective July 16, 2026. This is a strategic hire, as Mr. Parikh brings over 25 years of extensive experience in P&L management, sales, and business transformation from leading consumer goods companies like Diageo, Reckitt, and PepsiCo, which is expected to significantly bolster Havells' growth and operational capabilities. The document presents no apparent red flags, indicating a standard senior management change aimed at strengthening leadership.
